name: split-io
description: Reads Split.io workspaces, environments, feature flags, segments, groups, traffic types, and users, and writes feature-flag kill/restore/archive/unarchive and segment-key mutations through the Split Admin API.

risk.read: external Split.io API read of workspace, environment, feature-flag, segment, group, traffic-type, and user data
risk.write: external Split.io API mutation that reshapes live feature-flag targeting/rollout state or segment membership for every SDK evaluating it
risk.approval: reverse ETL plan approval required before all writes; every write action in this bundle changes production feature-flag or segment-targeting behavior
